metadata.title: We Will Join You In Nothing
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Best Left Forgotten; We Stay Silent
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Betrayed Us
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Kine, Bow Are Heads And Follow In The Bleak
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - On Towards Nothing, Only The Blind See The Sun
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Endlessly We've Suffered; We Can Withstand No Longer
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - First Through The Stench, We Clutch our Broken Hands And Walk, Wracked With Fatigue, Aching For The End
07 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We've Pulled Back The Veil, Relinquish The Throes Of The Lie; We Will Join You In Nothing
